revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:Adding Category to uncategorized categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:859 establishments]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:859年設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات سنة 859]] [[az:Category:859-cu ildə yarananlar]] [[bn:Category:৮৫৯-এ প্রতিষ্ঠিত]] [[bs:Category:Osnivanja u 859.]] [[commons:Category:859 establishments]] [[cs:Category:Vzniklo 859]] [[de:Category:Gegründet 859]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های ۸۵۹ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:859 հիմնադրումներ]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên 859an]] [[la:Category:Constituta 859]] [[mn:Category:859 онд байгуулагдсан]] [[nn:Category:Skipingar i 859]] [[ro:Category:Fondări în 859]] [[ru:Category:Появились в 859 году]] [[sl:Category:Ustanovitve leta 859]] [[tr:Category:859'da kurulan oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Засновані 859]] [[ur:Category:859ء کی تاسیسات]]
